name: spec
description: | Use when the user is exploring a design idea, weighing approaches, or has an ambiguous request. Asks structured questions, proposes 2-3 approaches, walks the design section-by-section. On approval, auto-chains into /hyperflow:scope. Trigger with /hyperflow:spec, "should I", "how should we", "what's the best way to", "design this", "explore the approach".
author: jeremylongshore
summary_zh: 在你对设计方向举棋不定或需求模糊时派上用场，会通过结构化提问帮你梳理思路、给出几种可选方案，并逐段推演设计细节，确认后自动进入下一步范围界定。
